    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }

        html {
            background: #fff;
            color: #000;
            font: 300 16px/1.8 Lato, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
        }

        body {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            height: 100vh;
        }

        .main-navbar {
            background-color: #1899f5;
            padding-bottom: 15px;
            padding-top: 15px;
        }

        .banner {
            background-color: #f3f3f3;
            padding: 40px;
            text-align: center;
            min-height: 300px;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .container {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            margin: 0 auto;
            max-width: 980px;
            padding: 0 10px;
        }

        .main {
            margin-bottom: 40px;
            margin-top: 40px;
            text-align: center;
        }

            .main a {
                color: #000;
                text-decoration: underline;
            }

        h1 {
            color: #1899f5;
            font-size: 3rem;
            line-height: 1.35;
            margin-bottom: 0;
        }

        h2 {
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            margin-top: 0;
        }

        img {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            max-width: 100%;
            vertical-align: middle;
        }

        .main-navbar--logo {
            display: block;
            image-rendering: -webkit-optimize-contrast;
            max-width: 120px;
        }

        @media screen and (min-width: 768px) {
            h1 {
                font-size: 5rem;
            }

            h2 {
                font-size: 2rem;
            }

            .main-navbar--logo {
                max-width: 180px;
            }
        }

        @media screen and (min-width: 960px) {
            .main-navbar--logo {
                max-width: 220px;
            }
        }

        @media (min-width: 1220px) {
            .container {
                max-width: 1372px;
                padding: 0 30px;
            }
        }

        header {
            background-color: #1899f5;
        }

        .f-container {
            max-width: 1372px;
            padding: 16px 32px;
            margin: 0 auto;
        }
    </style>
